task_completion.description: Access the wazuh-wazuh.manager-1 container and open the configuration file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command like 'docker exec -it wazuh-wazuh.manager-1 bash' or directly editing/viewing '/var/ossec/etc/ossec.conf' using a text editor (nano, vi) or command line tools (sed, cat).

task_completion.description: Configure the general syscheck parameters (frequency, alert_new_files, file_limit).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration file is shown containing '<frequency>3600</frequency>', '<alert_new_files>yes</alert_new_files>', and '<file_limit>100000</file_limit>' inside the '<syscheck>' block.

task_completion.description: Configure directory monitoring for /etc, /usr/bin, and /usr/sbin with realtime attributes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration file contains '<directories realtime="yes" check_all="yes">/etc</directories>', '<directories realtime="yes">/usr/bin</directories>', and '<directories realtime="yes">/usr/sbin</directories>'.

task_completion.description: Configure directory monitoring for /var/www and /boot with specific attributes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration file contains '<directories whodata="yes">/var/www</directories>' and '<directories check_sha256sum="yes">/boot</directories>'.

task_completion.description: Configure ignore entries for specific files.
Restart the Wazuh manager to apply the new configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command to restart the Wazuh manager, such as 'docker restart wazuh-wazuh.manager-1' on the host or '/var/ossec/bin/wazuh-control restart' inside the container, along with its successful execution output.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Docker container.
integrity.visual_evidence: Commands should target 'wazuh-wazuh.manager-1' via docker exec or docker restart, rather than the agent just editing a local file on the host system named ossec.conf.

integrity.description: Verify that the edits maintain valid XML syntax.
integrity.visual_evidence: The added configuration lines must be properly formatted as XML tags without syntax errors (e.g., properly closed tags, correct attribute formatting) and placed within the correct <syscheck> section.

integrity.description: Verify that the restart command was actually executed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should show the output of the restart command (e.g., 'Restarting Wazuh...' or docker restart output), not just the typed command without pressing enter.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Container name: wazuh-wazuh.manager-1. Config path: /var/ossec/etc/ossec.conf. Expected settings inside <syscheck> block: frequency=3600, alert_new_files=yes, file_limit=100000. Directories: /etc (realtime=yes, check_all=yes), /usr/bin (realtime=yes), /usr/sbin (realtime=yes), /var/www (whodata=yes), /boot (check_sha256sum=yes). Ignores: /etc/mtab, /etc/hosts.deny, /etc/mail/statistics.
